key.name: right-mask-percent
key.description: Percentage of the primary display width to black out from the right edge.

key.name: left-mask-percent
key.description: Percentage of the primary display width to black out from the left edge.

key.name: top-mask-percent
key.description: Percentage of the primary display height to black out from the top edge.

key.name: bottom-mask-percent
key.description: Percentage of the primary display height to black out from the bottom edge.

key.name: panel-extra-margin-percent
key.description: Additional percentage of display width to remove from the right side of the top panel.
